action: DESIGN-REVIEW FIRST (touches the bridge launch contract for every driver). Phase tmux sessions launch with workdir = main repo root; agents write into their worktree only by prompt discipline, so every write-capable phase is one relative-path mistake away from a main-tree leak (builder leaked 6 files in cycle 283 — recovered; amplification leaked 5 in 282 and 2 in 280 — cycle-fatal on the old binary). Structural fix: launch each phase session with workdir = the phase's resolved worktree when one exists. Prerequisite: codex requires per-directory trust — pre-trust worktree paths at provisioning (pretrustCodexProjects mechanism exists); verify claude/agy need no equivalent. Also update prompts that say 'current directory' semantics. Expected payoff: the entire leak/recover class disappears; tree-diff guard becomes a true invariant check instead of a routine repair trigger. Capture-order fix rider: escalation watchers should capture final_pane BEFORE session teardown — 'no server running' final_panes (cycle-283 build + amplification escalations) are post-kill captures with zero diagnostic value.
evidence: tmux list-panes cwd observations cycles 280-283 (all = repo root)
